title: Brenton Valentine's Chocolate Chip Coffee Cake
instructions: Cream butter and sugar together in a large bowl until smooth.
Add eggs and beat until light.
Add sour cream, baking powder, salt, baking soda, and vanilla extract to the mixture.
Gradually add in flour and mix well.
Mix topping ingredients together in a separate bowl.
Sprinkle 1/3 of the topping into a greased tube pan.
Scoop in 1/2 of the cake batter over the topping.
Sprinkle an additional 1/3 of the topping ingredients.
Layer remaining cake batter on top.
Top with the last of the topping.
Bang pan on countertop to level the cake.
Use a chopstick to poke holes randomly in the dough.
Bake 50-60 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
notes: This is a traditional Christmas morning coffee cake and Brenton's birthday cake.
Adapted from Pinch of Salt Lake cookbook.
Use either pecans or walnuts for the topping based on preference.
